title: Pour Plating Protocol for Emiliania Huxleyi (Single Colonies)
author: Inbal Nussbaum
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.p4ydqxw
materials: Autoclave 75 mL DDW with 0.75 g agarose
Let solidify to a loose consistency

steps.title: For 300 mL (= 7 plates)
steps.instruction: For 300 mL (= 7 plates): heat 225 mL FSW in a 50 °C water bath.

steps.title: Cool autoclaved agar to 50 °C,...
steps.instruction: Cool autoclaved agar to 50 °C, mix with heated FSW, add F/2 stock and antibiotics if necessary. Swirl/mix well.

steps.title: For each sample, pour 40 mL...
steps.instruction: For each sample, pour 40 mL of FSW-agar mixture to a 50 mL conical tube.

steps.title: Prepare the cells at desired cell concentration
steps.instruction: Prepare the cells at desired cell concentration. For each sample prepare 0.5ml cells.

steps.title: When you are ready, remove FSW-agar...
steps.instruction: When you are ready, remove FSW-agar mix from 32 °C bath and allow to cool 1-2 degreesCritical: the mixture will start to solidify at 27-28 °C.

steps.title: Add cell suspension to each tube,...
steps.instruction: Add cell suspension to each tube, mix gently, then pour into plates.

steps.title: Transfer to growth room
steps.instruction: Transfer to growth room. Single colonies should appear within 10 days (without selection).
